S.FORM: Rolando Blackman sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1959, ryax sa tay 26 nqu tay 2, Rolando Blackman, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: rolan*o Œ≤la ¶~ ®kman s~…ïraral ƒßja î…£a s~…ïis~…ïjuw na nŒ≤a, wal malaxmis~…ïuq qanij la. kawas~…ï taj ****, rjax s~…ïa taj ** nqu taj *, rolan*o Œ≤la ¶~ ®kman, s~…ïquliq na p îunro. ¶~ ®inkƒßulan s~…ïa knita î s~…ïa Œ≤rŒ≤iru î lis~…ïts~…ï o* national Œ≤as~…ïketŒ≤all as~…ïs~…ïo ¶~ ®iation plajers~…ï
